name: standards fetcher: when upstream fetch fails, prior cached content is preserved unchanged (no partial overwrite)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache && echo "GOOD CACHED" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache/src-1.html && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetcher.sh" --source-id src-1 --fragility-tier high --strategy silent-replace --upstream-stub "$PWD/fail.sh" --cache "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache" 2>/dev/null && grep "GOOD CACHED" .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache/src-1.html 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
